message:
🌱 Add operator-framework: [ansible] CR variables converted to snake_case when passed mission (#1624)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "operator-framework-1770-ansible-cr-variables-converted-to-snake-case-when-passed",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "operator-framework: [ansible] CR variables converted to snake_case when passed to playbook",
+    "description": "[ansible] CR variables converted to snake_case when passed to playbook. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current operator-framework deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your operator-framework version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nhelm list -n operator-framework 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working operator-framework installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review operator-framework configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant operator-framework configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get configmap -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=operator-framework\n```\n**What did you do?**\n\nI have a CR yaml that contains camelCase key names. When the ansible playbook is called, all keys are converted to snake_case."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [ansible] CR variables converted to snake_case when passed…",
+        "description": "for a resource named:\n```yaml\n- version: v1alpha1\n  group: softwarefactory-project.io\n  kind: Zuul\n```\nYou can access the unmodified spec with this ansible var: `_softwarefactory-project_io_zuul_spec`, at least with quay.io/operator-framework/ansible-operator:v0.13.0\n```yaml\n$ kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"14\", GitVersion:\"v1.14.2\", GitCommit:\"66049e3b21efe110454d67df4fa62b08ea79a19b\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-05-16T16:23:09Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.12.5\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"13+\", GitVersion:\"v1.13.4+6569b4f\", GitCommit:\"6569b4f\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-07-10T19:31:33Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.11.6\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade operator-framework to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade operator-framework:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade operator-framework operator-framework/operator-framework --namespace operator-framework\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework\nhelm list -n operator-framework\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get events -n operator-framework --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[ansible] CR variables converted to snake_case when passed…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "for a resource named:\n```yaml\n- version: v1alpha1\n  group: softwarefactory-project.io\n  kind: Zuul\n```\nYou can access the unmodified spec with this ansible var: `_softwarefactory-project_io_zuul_spec`, at least with quay.io/operator-framework/ansible-operator:v0.13.0",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"14\", GitVersion:\"v1.14.2\", GitCommit:\"66049e3b21efe110454d67df4fa62b08ea79a19b\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-05-16T16:23:09Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.12.5\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"13+\", GitVersion:\"v1.13.4+6569b4f\", GitCommit:\"6569b4f\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-07-10T19:31:33Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.11.6\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}",
+        "deployment:\n    version: \"1.0\"\n    affinity:\n      pod:\n        preferredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution:\n        - weight: 100\n          podAffinityTerm:\n            labelSelector:\n              matchExpressions:\n              - key: security\n                operator: In\n                values:\n                - S2\n            topologyKey: failure-domain.beta.kubernetes.io/zone",
+        "- debug:\n    msg: \"STARTING OPTEST: deployment is: {{ deployment }}\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "operator-framework",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "operator-framework"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Role"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk/issues/1770",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 21,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with operator-framework installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:26:36.639Z",

+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
